recipe.notes: Tags: Main, Normal, chicken, cashew, peppers, snow peas
recipe.title: Cashew chicken

ingredient_lines.note: fry in batches in peanut oil. Set aside.
ingredient_lines.preparation: cut into pieces and toss in, crushed
ingredient_lines.raw_text: chicken - cut into pieces and toss in cornstarch, crushed cashews, salt and pepper, fry in batches in peanut oil. Set aside.

ingredient_lines.note: In same wok, saute green pepper, onion, snow peas, salt and pepper. Add splash of soy and red wine vinegar. Cook until tender, set aside.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: In same wok, saute green pepper, red pepper, onion, snow peas, salt and pepper. Add splash of soy and red wine vinegar. Cook until tender, set aside.

ingredient_lines.note: 2 T sesame oil and red pepper flake, let sit on low for a few minutes. Add 1 T white wine vinegar, 2/3 Cup Soy, 1/2 cup crushed cashews, 4 cloves of garlic finely minced and 1/4 cup white sugar.
ingredient_lines.raw_text: In same wok, 2 T sesame oil and red pepper flake, let sit on low for a few minutes. Add 1 T white wine vinegar, 2/3 Cup Soy, 1/2 cup crushed cashews, 4 cloves of garlic finely minced and 1/4 cup white sugar.
Saute until begins to thicken (don't burn garlic).

ingredient_lines.input_item: Toss chicken and veggies back in wok
ingredient_lines.raw_text: Toss chicken and veggies back in wok, saute and stir to combine.
